title: Working Paper Input (spectrum-systems canonical)
description: Canonical ingest artifact describing a working paper input and its linkage to the standards manifest. The working paper must be a PDF with visible line numbers printed on the left margin of each page; these left-margin line numbers are the anchor system for generated review comments.

artifact_type.description: Artifact discriminator for working paper input.

standard_source.description: Canonical source repository for this contract.

working_paper.description: Metadata for the PDF working paper under review. source_uri must point to the numbered PDF file.

source_uri.description: URI of the numbered PDF working paper (required). The PDF must have visible line numbers on the left margin of each page.

has_line_numbers.description: Indicates that the PDF has visible left-margin line numbers. Must be true for the line anchor contract to apply. If false or absent, the engine must fall back to page+section anchors only and mark line fields blank.

standards_manifest_ref.description: Identifier or URI of the standards manifest used for this input.
